title: A+ Media for Marine Phytoplankton
author: Dr. Steven Wilhelm
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ibncame

steps.instruction: Add 18 g NaCl Sodium Chloride Contributed by users Catalog #PubChem CID:5234
Add 5 g MgSO 4 *7H 2 O Magnesium sulfate heptahydrate Contributed by users
Add 0.6 g KCl Potassium chloride P212121
Add 0.04 g H 3 BO 3 Boric acid Fisher Scientific Catalog #BP1681
Add 0.360 g CaCl 2 *2H 2 O Calcium Chloride Contributed by users
Add 0.03 g Na 2 EDTA EDTA Disodium Salt Contributed by users Catalog #PubChem CID:8759
Add 0.05 g KH 2 PO 4 Potassium phosphate (monobasic) P212121
Add 1.0 g NaNO 3 Sodium nitrate P212121
Add 1 mL FeCl 3 (3.89 g/L in 0.1 N HCl stock) Iron(III) chloride hexahydrate Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #44944
Add 8.3 mL Tris (1 M stock at pH = 7.8) Tris Contributed by users
Autoclave separately and combine for 1 L media
Add 0.1 mL vitamin solution once media is cooled For vitamin solution add: Thiamine (100 mg/mL), Vitamin B 12 (2 mg/mL) and Biotin (1 mg/mL) Filter sterilize (0.2 µm) prior to media addition
